form.formComment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Bendigo over 425m. Racing well and has to be included.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Warragul over 400m. Last start finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 15 over 390m at Ballarat behind Lightning Range beaten 5.5 lengths (22.47). Should be right in the finish.
